calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ADRIAN DRISCOLL, ESQ., ROPERS MAJESKI KOHN BENTLEY, 415.543.4800, FOR PETITIONERS MUNICIPAL ATTORNEY'S ASSOCIATION AND MARSANNE WEESE.
JESSE LAD, ESQ., MEYERS NAVE, 510.808.2000, FOR RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PETITIONERS MUNICIPAL ATTORNEY'S ASSOCIATION and MARSANNE WEESE'S Petition To Compel Arbitration is granted. The FAA does not apply because Petitioner failed to show that the MOU involves interstate commerce. The MOU contains a valid and enforceable arbitration agreement that covers the dispute raised by Petitioner. There was no waiver because at least some of the damages claimed (delay damages) post-date the signing of her release. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
